summary: Iteration 61 - Payout Features Testing. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. Fixed route ordering bug where PUT /admin/payouts/schedule was being matched by PUT /admin/payouts/{withdrawal_id}. Also fixed GET /admin/payouts/schedule to merge with defaults for partial configs.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in day selector dropdown - minor hydration issue

passed_tests: Backend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com / MAYAsimpSON37!! works
Backend: POST /api/wallet/withdraw with amount < 100 returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/wallet/withdraw with amount = 99.99 returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/wallet/withdraw with amount = 100 checks balance correctly
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/schedule returns config with all fields (frequency, day_of_month, min_threshold, auto_process, notify_email)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/schedule updates frequency
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/schedule updates day_of_month
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/schedule updates min_threshold
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/schedule updates auto_process toggle
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/schedule updates notify_email toggle
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/schedule returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: PUT /api/admin/payouts/schedule returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: POST /api/admin/payouts/auto-process returns results (processed, notified, threshold)
Backend: POST /api/admin/payouts/auto-process returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts returns list of withdrawals
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts?status=pending filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/summary returns stats
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/export returns CSV
Frontend: Wallet page shows 'Minimum payout threshold: $100.00' text

Frontend: Admin Payouts page loads with 'Payout Dashboard' title
Frontend: Schedule button opens schedule panel
Frontend: Schedule panel has frequency dropdown
Frontend: Schedule panel has day of month selector
Frontend: Schedule panel has threshold input (shows 100)
Frontend: Schedule panel has auto-process toggle
Frontend: Schedule panel has email notifications toggle
Frontend: Auto-Process button present
Frontend: Export CSV button present
Frontend: Stats cards show Pending, Processing, Completed, Failed, Total User Balances
Frontend: Agreement page (Artist) mentions $100.00 USD minimum threshold
Frontend: Agreement page (Producer) mentions $100.00 USD minimum payout threshold
seed_data_creation: Existing test withdrawals in DB: 0 pending, 3 processing, 3 completed, 1 failed. Schedule config stored in payout_settings collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 tested the new payout features: 1) $100 minimum payout threshold (backend validates in /api/wallet/withdraw, frontend shows on wallet page and agreement pages), 2) Payout schedule settings (GET/PUT /api/admin/payouts/schedule with frequency, day_of_month, min_threshold, auto_process, notify_email), 3) Auto-process endpoint (POST /api/admin/payouts/auto-process processes pending payouts >= threshold and sends email notifications). IMPORTANT: Fixed route ordering bug - schedule routes must be defined BEFORE the {withdrawal_id} route to avoid path parameter matching 'schedule' as a withdrawal ID. Also fixed GET schedule endpoint to merge with defaults for partial configs.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering - PUT /admin/payouts/{withdrawal_id} was matching 'schedule' as withdrawal_id before the schedule route
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved schedule routes (GET/PUT /admin/payouts/schedule and POST /admin/payouts/auto-process) BEFORE the {withdrawal_id} route in server.py

bugs_fixed.issue: GET /api/admin/payouts/schedule returning partial config without all fields
bugs_fixed.root_cause: When config exists in DB with partial fields, defaults were not merged
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed GET endpoint to merge stored config with defaults: return {**defaults, **config}

payout_schedule_settings.frontend: Schedule panel in AdminPayoutsPage with all controls

auto_process_payouts.behavior: Processes pending payouts >= threshold, sets status='processing', auto_processed=True, sends email notifications
